settings.caption: Traditional Craft · Restored by Hand · From £30
settings.heading: Cane Chair Restoration
settings.text:
Got a cherished chair with a sagging or broken cane seat? It can be saved. Using traditional hand-weaving techniques, each seat is recaned strand by strand — restoring it to its original strength and appearance without replacing the chair.

Heirloom dining chairs, Victorian nursing chairs, vintage market finds — if the frame is sound, the seat can be restored. A proper repair lasts decades. Free quotes via email with no obligation.

settings.caption: Handknitted in the UK · Reversible · From £15
settings.heading: Handmade Wooly Beanies
settings.text:
Warm, cosy, and genuinely handmade — every beanie is knitted using premium wool blends, one at a time. Reversible designs give you two colourways in a single hat, and each one is made to last rather than fall apart after a season.

A practical gift that actually feels considered. From £15.

settings.caption: 3D Printed · Personalised · From £12
settings.heading: Custom Lithophane Prints
settings.text: A lithophane is a 3D-printed tile that reveals your photograph in glowing detail when held up to the light. What looks like a plain white panel transforms into a portrait, landscape, or memory — it has to be seen to be believed. From £12.

settings.caption: One Maker · Three Crafts · Made Properly

settings.text:
Hi, I'm Charlie — every item you see here is made, restored or finished by me, by hand. Whether I'm weaving a cane chair seat, knitting a beanie, or printing a lithophane on my 3D printer, the same principle applies: do it properly or don't do it at all.

If you have a question, want to discuss a custom order, or need a quote for a chair, email me directly: Charliebthomas@icloud.com. You'll get a reply from me, not a bot.

settings.heading: How much does cane chair restoration cost?
settings.row_content: Small seats from £30, medium from £55, large or complex from £80. Email a photo to Charliebthomas@icloud.com for a quote within 48 hours — no obligation.

settings.heading: How long does restoration take?
settings.row_content: Approximately 4–8 weeks from receipt. Hand-weaving is slow, precise work — the time reflects what the job actually takes.

settings.heading: Can I post my chair?
settings.row_content: Smaller chairs can usually be posted safely. Larger pieces may be better dropped off. Get in touch at Charliebthomas@icloud.com to discuss.

settings.heading: Will the restored seat last?
settings.row_content: Yes — a properly hand-woven cane seat should last 20–30 years or more with reasonable care. Quality rattan cane throughout, no synthetic substitutes.

settings.heading: What materials are used?
settings.row_content: Premium wool blend yarns — warm, soft, not scratchy, and holds shape wash after wash. No cheap filler yarns.

settings.heading: Are they machine washable?
settings.row_content: Hand wash in cool water and lay flat to dry. Gentle machine wash is possible but may cause shrinkage over time. No tumble drying.

settings.heading: Can I request a specific colour?
settings.row_content: Yes — email Charliebthomas@icloud.com with your requirements. Custom colours welcome subject to yarn availability.

settings.heading: Do they make good gifts?
settings.row_content: Genuinely, yes. Handmade gifts land differently. Posted in simple sustainable packaging, can be sent direct to recipient. Just mention a note when ordering.

settings.heading: What exactly is a lithophane?
settings.row_content: A 3D-printed tile that reveals your photo in glowing detail when backlit. In normal light it looks plain white; hold it to a light source and the full image appears. It has to be seen to be believed.

settings.heading: What photo quality do I need?
settings.row_content: A clear, well-lit phone photo is usually fine. Good contrast and a visible subject matter most. Send the image if unsure and we'll advise before printing.

settings.heading: How long does production take?
settings.row_content: Most dispatched within 5–7 working days. Mention any deadline when ordering and we'll do our best to accommodate it.

settings.heading: Can I order multiple copies?
settings.row_content: Yes — same price per unit. Great as matching gifts. Adjust quantity at checkout or email for larger orders.
